decision_log.decision: Designer-prep is a hat, not a phase override or review-agent
options: New plan-class hat 'designer-prep' inserted before designer in the design stage's hats: list
Phase override on the design stage's ELABORATION.md instructing the designer to do prior-art reads itself
New review-agent 'design-system-anchor' that runs in the review phase and rejects mockups not grounded in source
decision_log.choice: New plan-class hat 'designer-prep' inserted before designer in the design stage's hats: list
decision_log.rationale: Today's hats list [designer, design-reviewer] is missing the plan slot from architecture §3 (plan -> do -> verify). Adding designer-prep as a plan-class hat closes both the prior-art-grounding gap (#263 items 1, 3, 4, 6) AND brings the stage into compliance with the canonical pattern. Phase override would conflate planning with execution in one role; review-agent would catch drift after-the-fact instead of preventing it.

decision_log.decision: Inception-coverage is a review-agent, not a verifier hat
options: Review-agent under design/review-agents/ that audits design output against inception's DECISIONS.md / OPEN-QUESTIONS.md / UI-SURFACES
Verifier hat at the end of the design stage's hats: list that performs the same audit as part of the per-unit verify slot
decision_log.choice: Review-agent under design/review-agents/ that audits design output against inception's DECISIONS.md / OPEN-QUESTIONS.md / UI-SURFACES
decision_log.rationale: Architecture §3.4 states verifier hats are body-only — they cannot read cross-stage artifacts. Inception-coverage by definition reads inception artifacts while sitting in the design stage. A verifier hat would either require widening hat read scope (architectural drift) or silently fail. Review-agents already have intent-wide read scope, making them the canonical home for cross-stage audits.

decision_log.decision: Era tag is body-level annotation, not a frontmatter schema change
options: Content-guide-only edit to DISCOVERY.md template — era tag is inline parenthetical body annotation (active / dormant / deprecated / in-flight)
New frontmatter field on inception's DISCOVERY.md output (e.g. era_inventory: {file: era}) with a validator that checks coverage
decision_log.choice: Content-guide-only edit to DISCOVERY.md template — era tag is inline parenthetical body annotation (active / dormant / deprecated / in-flight)
decision_log.rationale: Per architecture §1.1, frontmatter is workflow-engine territory and additions cost discovery + validator + downstream-consumer work. The era tag is read visually by downstream hats during grounding — no programmatic consumer needs it. Inline parenthetical placement also guarantees the tag survives excerpt-into-subagent-prompt operations, which a separate frontmatter-legend would lose. Smallest-shape change that fully closes #263 item 5.
